androidtv_missing.title: Android TV integration recommended
androidtv_missing.description: The Android TV integration is not configured. It is recommended to enable the ADB buttons (Assist, Overlay, Accessibility) shipped with Peek-it [HA]. Add it under *Settings -> Devices & Services -> Add integration -> Android TV*.
